category_sources: Official TakTuk site describes adaptive large scale remote executions deployment for potentially large sets of remote nodes.
docs_sources: Official homepage links a Documentation page with user guide and manpages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official TakTuk site links release tarballs and contact/issue resources on gitlab.inria.fr but no clear browsable official source-control project URL was verified.
tags_sources: Official homepage and download page describe deploying commands to large remote node sets, cluster use, Perl implementation, and default SSH connector behavior.
